headline: Qualcomm (QCOM) Is In Talks To Buy Modular And Push Further Into AI Chips
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) is reported to be in advanced talks to acquire AI chip startup Modular Inc. in a multi billion dollar deal. The potential transaction would mark a push by Qualcomm to build out its AI infrastructure and data center offerings beyond its core smartphone chip business. The negotiations are ongoing and the deal, if completed, would represent a major move into markets currently led by larger AI chip competitors. For investors watching Qualcomm, this prospective...

headline: Is Lumentum (LITE) Turning Its AI Optics Backlog Into a Durable Data Center Edge?
summary: Lumentum Holdings recently presented at the Rome Conference on AI Ethics and Governance, with board chair Penny Herscher and CEO Michael Hurlston outlining the company’s role in AI-related optical technologies. Investor attention has centered on Lumentum’s more than US$400 million backlog in optical circuit switches and co-packaged optics, supported by partnerships in AI data center infrastructure. Next, we’ll examine how this large AI optics backlog and related positioning influence...
